pickup_details.label: Bali hotel area pickup (origin)
pickup_details.note: Origin-scoped standard: Bali-origin tours are picked up at the guest's Bali hotel. No structured 01-pickup-context exists for this yet.

bali_transfer.note: Bali-origin: Gilimanuk→Ketapang sea crossing at the START; the tour then finishes in Surabaya (NOT a finish in Bali).
